title: Can't use StringBuilder containing emoji as MySqlParameter.Value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE emoji(value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_data(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data(description) VALUES(NULL), ('Test with emoji: 😃');
SELECT * FROM emoji WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: StringBuilder with emoji fails as MySqlParameter.Value
